sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101901" key="sxoinanqa=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχοινανθ-ᾶτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n101901.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wine made with</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σχοινάνθη</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:33:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.33.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
